_provenance_: Phase 1 disclaimer: SYNTHETIC reference state vectors. Per the prompt's
permission and the Phase 1 plan §10 footnote, when sourcing public ISS
reference vectors proves hard, we generate synthetic 'reference' vectors
by propagating from a known initial state with the full force model and
treat the regression as a 'self-consistency' test rather than an ISS-
reproduction test. Phase 7 will replace these with NASA Spot-The-Station
_units_: metres / metres-per-second; epoch in TT JD (jd1, jd2)
_frame_: J2000 (ICRF up to ~17 mas frame bias)
